文件列表

文件路径 直链地址
dist/jquery.factory.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/jquery.factory.js
dist/jquery.factory.slim.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/jquery.factory.slim.js

dist/jquery.slim.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/jquery.slim.js
dist/jquery.slim.min.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/jquery.slim.min.js
dist/wrappers/jquery.bundler-require-wrapper.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/wrappers/jquery.bundler-require-wrapper.js
dist/wrappers/jquery.bundler-require-wrapper.slim.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/jquery/4.0.0-rc.2/dist/wrappers/jquery.bundler-require-wrapper.slim.js
